calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rolf Tyler, petitioner in Pro Per (via Zoom).

The Court called the matter on the amended petition for letters of administration.

The Court noted that Mr. Tyler had not made sufficient progress on the outstanding issues, that keeping the petition on calendar would not be productive under the circumstances. The Court inquired whether Mr. Tyler would object to the matter being taken off calendar. Mr. Tyler raised no objections.

The Court took the petition off calendar, and advised Mr. Tyler that he could refile at a later time when he is ready and able.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Continued To Sep-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rolf Tyler appeared via zoom pro per (petitioner).

Mr. Tyler stated that the property under foreclosure is set for August 14, 2025, that he intends to file for a continuance for the sale, and that he has started the publication process but needs to address the other issues. The matter is continued to September 15, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Continued To Aug-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rolf Taylor appeared via zoom in pro per (petitioner).

Mr. Taylor stated that he did not have funds to hire an attorney, that he is seeking to get letters and be the administrator, so they don't auction off the house, that the trust was never recorded, and the house has over $100,000 in equity. The Court recommended that he seek more information via Internet or the library to obtain information to fill out his paperwork properly. The matter is continued to August 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rolf Tyler, Petitioner in Pro Per.

The Court noted that the primary asset in question appeared to be a property held in the Lillie Tyler Trust and advised Mr. Tyler that if the property is in trust, probate may not be necessary. The Court recommended that Mr. Tyler consider retaining legal counsel to explore his options and provided Mr. Rolf with a phone number to contact the Bar Association of San Francisco for a referral. Mr. Tyler expressed concern about an upcoming trustee sale scheduled for June 5, indicating his desire to delay the sale.

The court continued the matter to July 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow Mr. Tyler time to seek legal counsel and determine an appropriate course of action, such as obtaining Letters of Special Administration.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
